GeneratedArticle.title: GeneratedArticle
GeneratedArticle.description: An article optimized for SEO generated by the system and saved by the user.

id.description: The unique ID of the article

title.description: The generated H1 title of the article

wordCount.description: Length of the generated article in words

content.description: The full content in Markdown format

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated/saved this article

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the article was created

/articles/{articleId}.description: Collection of generated SEO optimized articles saved by users
